name: boltcall-worktree-guard
description: Protects Boltcall root main from direct edits by forcing worktree isolation in Codex and Claude.

interface.shortDescription: Blocks direct edits on protected main checkouts
interface.longDescription: Auto-creates session worktrees on startup, blocks Write/Edit calls on protected root checkouts, and auto-commits changes inside linked worktrees.
defaultPrompt: Protect this repo's main branch with worktree-only edits.
